progress_summary:
Two-PR session triaging the v1.4 roadmap-decision branch (#185) and a pre-existing demo sidebar drift (#186). #185 (versioning + doc-governance decision doc) merged after a heavy rebase: the original branch carried release-ops scaffold + symlink + four CI unblockers, but main absorbed the equivalents independently via the v1.3 sprint 3/4 merge and #187 v1.4-plan-checkpoint. Trimmed the branch down to just `roadmap/06-versioning-and-doc-governance.md` (1 file, 206 lines) and squash-merged. #186 was rebased to the one residual change still missing on main — replacing `
scenarios · 6
` at DesktopWorkbench.astro:92 with `{sidebar.length}` so the desktop sidebar header tracks the catalog (currently 12 scenarios, was 6 when hardcoded). All other halves of the original PR landed via main. CI on #186 is still queued at session-handoff.

progress_table.label: Triage #185 vs current main (release-ops landed independently)
Rebase #185 → trim to roadmap doc only (1 file / 206 lines)
Triage #186 vs current main (3 of 4 commits redundant via #187)
Rebase #186 → trim to DesktopWorkbench.astro:92 fix (1 line)
bug-check gate on #186 — vitest 124/124, build green, scans clean

key_decisions: v1.3 ships release-ops as the 18th skill; v1.4 owns the catalog rollout (governance frontmatter + per-skill CHANGELOG). Recorded in roadmap/06-versioning-and-doc-governance.md.

Don't carry redundant CI unblockers across rebases. Main's #187 (v1.4-plan-checkpoint) landed walkthroughs.length, /changelog axe disable, V13_DEEP_LINKS split, and app-architect schema fix — equivalent or better than this session's cherry-picks. Took main's version and dropped the duplicates rather than fighting with merge conflicts that produce divergent-but-equivalent code.
DesktopWorkbench.astro:92 was the one residual change worth keeping from #186. Pattern matches line 363 of the same file ('{sidebar.length} scenarios loaded') so it's drift-proof going forward.

Pre-commit hook (.claude/hooks/pre-commit-bugcheck.sh) reads skill_state.last_run.at — updating only `updated_at` is not enough; `skill_state.last_run.at` and `verdict` must be bumped for the gate to recognise a fresh run. Worth knowing for future automated commit flows.
Manual deploy stays manual (CLAUDE.md): merging to main does not deploy; staging.opchain.dev needs `npm run deploy:staging` from a logged-in laptop, then `npm run deploy` for prod.
user_preferences: Wants both PRs merged in a single ask; happy with squash-merge as the default.
Tolerates noisy webhook channels (LHCI advisory comments) without action — only flags when something is genuinely tractable.
Comfortable taking main's version of conflicting equivalents during rebase rather than re-litigating prose.

next_actions: Wait for #186 CI (Worker / Site / Playwright; LHCI is advisory) and merge once green.
Post-merge: visually verify /demo desktop sidebar header reads 'scenarios · 12' on next staging deploy.
Next session: run npm run checkpoint:status to resume; v1.4 sprint planning (governance frontmatter + per-skill CHANGELOG) is the next big-rock per the roadmap doc.
